'''B6''', nicknamed '''Beesix''', was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] built by [[Mala Mala]] as a friend and assistant. Mala left him behind in a spaceport on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]] when she, [[Fordee]], and a group of other [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] (including [[Brazzo]] and [[Selle]]) gathered to see if [[Ban Papeega]] could discover the name of the pilot who destroyed the first Death Star from [[Thurlow Harris]]. When Mala learned that the pilot's name was [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], she was hunted down by Vader's troops. After jumping from a cliff, Mala was rescued by B-6 and returned to her ship. They fled to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], but were shot down by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] patrol. B-6 was damaged beyond repair in the crash, but Mala reused his parts in a trap meant to delay the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who searched for them.
